detail.description: Hayden Senger homers (1) on a fly ball to left center field.
Hayden Senger grounds out, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Christopher Morel.
Hayden Senger reaches on a fielder's choice out, first baseman Christopher Morel to catcher Joe Mack. Marcus Semien out at home. Vidal Bruján to 2nd.
Hayden Senger grounds out, shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Ben Rice.
Hayden Senger bunt pops out softly to pitcher Elmer Rodríguez.
Hayden Senger lines out sharply to center fielder Wenceel Pérez.
Hayden Senger hits a sacrifice bunt. Marcus Semien scores. A.J. Ewing to 2nd. Hayden Senger to 1st.
Hayden Senger grounds out, shortstop Kevin McGonigle to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.
Hayden Senger grounds out, pitcher Keider Montero to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.
Hayden Senger singles on a line drive to right fielder James Wood. Marcus Semien to 3rd. A.J. Ewing to 2nd.

pitches.callDescription: Tyrone Taylor starts inning at 2nd base.
pitches.typeDescription: Tyrone Taylor starts inning at 2nd base.

detail.description: Hayden Senger out on a sacrifice bunt, third baseman Jorbit Vivas to second baseman Nasim Nuñez. Tyrone Taylor to 3rd.
Hayden Senger flies out to right fielder Owen Caissie.
Hayden Senger grounds out, third baseman Colt Emerson to first baseman Patrick Wisdom.
